pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-T-004 (Data Quality) scores 0.434 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for Cloud Platform Engineer: edge_case. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: Score 0.434 is below 0.44 threshold for edge-case inclusion in Cloud Platform Engineer.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Overturned to exclude. Score 0.434 insufficient for edge-case inclusion (min 0.44). Decision: exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Data Quality KSA DQ-T-004 as a discrete competency for Cloud Platform Engineer?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA excluded at Pass 2 (scope: edge_case) or Pass 3. No market evidence warrants reversal for Cloud Platform Engineer.

decision_rationale: Edge-case scope with score 0.434 below minimum threshold. Overturned at Pass 3.
